annotations.label: Fifth-order Farey sequence
annotations.note: No Farey sequence definition found in Mathlib via grep or loogle.

annotations.label: Decimal expansion of pi
annotations.note: Real.pi is defined in Mathlib but no decimal-digits sequence of pi is formalized.

annotations.label: Totient valence function
annotations.note: Nat.totient is in Mathlib but the inverse-counting totient valence function is not.

annotations.label: Lexicographical ordering of sample sequences
annotations.note: This is an editorial ordering of OEIS sample sequences with no Mathlib counterpart.

annotations.label: Self-referential sequence A031135

anchor.snippet: One of the earliest self-referential sequences

annotations.note: This particular OEIS self-referential sequence is not in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Russell's paradox for A053169

anchor.snippet: It can be proved that 53169 both is and is not a member

annotations.note: OEIS-meta paradox of sequence A053169 has no Mathlib formalization.

annotations.label: Cubes sequence A000578
annotations.note: The function n ↦ n^3 is expressible via standard power but no named A000578 sequence exists in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Multiplicative function keyword

anchor.snippet: The sequence corresponds to a multiplicative function

annotations.note: Mathlib defines ArithmeticFunction.IsMultiplicative matching the OEIS multiplicative-function notion.

annotations.label: Lazy caterer's sequence offset

anchor.snippet: In the case of the lazy caterer's sequence

annotations.note: No lazy-caterer or pancake-cut sequence found in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Sloane's gap

anchor.snippet: a clear "gap" between two distinct point clouds

annotations.note: Sloane's gap is an empirical OEIS observation with no Mathlib formalization.

annotations.label: Mersenne primes A000668
annotations.note: Mathlib defines mersenne p = 2^p - 1 but not the filtered sequence of Mersenne primes A000668 itself.

annotations.label: Exactly fifteen supersingular primes

anchor.snippet: the supersingular primes A002267 , of which there are precisely fifteen

annotations.note: No notion of supersingular prime (in the monstrous-moonshine sense) found in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Pascal's triangle A007318

anchor.snippet: Pascal's triangle read by rows, A007318

annotations.note: Nat.choose encodes the binomial coefficients that form Pascal's triangle.

annotations.label: Magic square smallest prime sequence A104157

anchor.snippet: A104157 enumerates the "smallest prime of n

annotations.note: This OEIS sequence about magic squares of primes has no Mathlib analogue.

annotations.label: Multiplicative computation in A046970
annotations.note: The general multiplicative-function machinery exists in Mathlib but A046970 itself is not formalized.
